hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||j.tool_response?.filePath||'';console.log(f)})" | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ \.(js|jsx|css)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; } || true
